summary: Summary: Speaker2 began by neutrally reporting a missing suitcase. Speaker1 responded neutrally with empathy, explained the bag missed the second plane, and outlined the reporting process and possible outcomes. After half an hour without the bag, Speaker2 experienced surprise. When told the airline could not locate or guarantee return of the bag, Speaker2’s feelings escalated to frustration and anger and they lashed out at Speaker1. Speaker1 remained neutral, acknowledged human error, and offered a $50 reimbursement. Speaker2 briefly felt surprise and even excited at the offer but remained in frustration and anger; ultimately they accepted the $50 and stormed off in frustration.
